Name: EoAT6-026 Repair Static Jaw Belt Not Moving
Notes:
Task Title:
EoAT6-026 Repair Static Jaw Belt Not Moving

Task description:
When starting EoAT 026 up on the reliability testbed, we observed that the wedge consistently failed to ingest and eject. Upon inspection the EoAT we found that the static jaw conveyor was not moving when a motion command was sent.

To rule out the possibility of a software issue, we tried to manually jog the conveyor, yet the conveyor still did not move. 

We will need someone from the EoAT team to investigate this issue so that we may get the testbed up and running again.
